title: SNOW to vRO DFW Lifecycle Trigger Payload
description: JSON Schema for validating the ServiceNow to vRealize Orchestrator DFW lifecycle trigger payload. This schema is used by the vRO workflow entry point (PayloadValidator.js) to validate incoming requests before processing.

correlationId.description: Unique correlation identifier generated by ServiceNow for end-to-end request tracking across SNOW, vRO, vCenter, and NSX-T. Format: RITM-{number}-{epochTimestamp}.

requestType.description: Type of DFW lifecycle operation to perform. Determines which orchestrator subclass handles the request.

schemaVersion.description: Payload schema version for forward compatibility.

vmName.description: VM name in vCenter. Must follow the enterprise naming convention.

site.description: Physical deployment site code determining which NSX-T manager and vCenter instance to target.

requestedBy.description: sys_id of the user who submitted the request in ServiceNow.

requestedByDisplayName.description: Display name of the requesting user.

callbackUrl.description: ServiceNow REST endpoint URL that vRO will call with the execution result (success or failure).

callbackToken.description: Bearer token for authenticating the callback request to ServiceNow. Vault reference placeholder in transit; resolved at runtime.

priority.description: Execution priority level. Controls queue ordering in vRO.

justification.description: Business justification for the request. Required for some approval workflows.
examples: New web server for Enterprise Portal expansion

vmTemplate.description: vCenter template name for VM cloning. Required for day0_provision requests.

cluster.description: Target vSphere cluster for VM placement. Required for day0_provision requests.

datastore.description: Target datastore or datastore cluster for VM storage. Required for day0_provision requests.

network.description: Target port group or NSX segment for the primary NIC. Required for day0_provision requests.

cpuCount.description: Number of virtual CPUs to allocate. Required for day0_provision requests.

memoryGB.description: Memory allocation in gigabytes. Required for day0_provision requests.

diskGB.description: Primary disk size in gigabytes. Required for day0_provision requests.

approvedBy.description: Display name of the approver who authorized the request.

approvalTimestamp.description: Timestamp when the request was approved.

tagAssignment.description: Tag assignments for the VM. Maps tag category names to their values. Single-value categories use strings; multi-value categories (Compliance) use arrays of strings. All values must exist in the Enterprise Tag Dictionary.

Application.description: Application code from the enterprise CMDB. Single-value. Dynamically validated against the tag dictionary.

Tier.description: Deployment tier within the application stack. Single-value.

Compliance.description: Applicable compliance frameworks. Multi-value. At least one value required; use ['None'] if no framework applies. 'None' is mutually exclusive with other values.

CostCenter.description: Financial cost center code for chargeback. Single-value, optional.
